# dragon-portfolio

Interactive React portfolio for Ram Prakash with an embedded AI assistant.

## Included in this starter

- Animated hero section with dark navy + red visual style
- Projects section loaded from local JSON data
- About section with animated skill bars
- Chatbot widget wired for Anthropic model claude-sonnet-4-20250514
- Contact form wired for EmailJS REST API
- Tailwind CSS styling with mobile-friendly layout

## Run locally

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Environment variables

Copy values into a local .env file:

- VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- VITE_EMAILJS_KEY
- VITE_EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID
- VITE_EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID

## Security note

For production usage, move Anthropic requests behind a backend API route so the API key is never exposed in the browser.
